'''Quantill City''' was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ando/Legends|Ando]]. The city was divided into [[Aquala/Legends|Aquala]] and [[Quara/Legends|Quara]] quarters. It was the location of the [[Raquish Thoroughfare]], where great celebrations took place after Ando's secession from the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] in [[23 BBY/Legends|23 BBY]].

{{City-stub}}
